devdoc.author: Marto (https://github.com/0xMarto)
devdoc.details: Feel free to leave any code improvements (DMs are open @0xMarto)

buyMarketSharesFor(address,uint256,uint2.details: Allows market operators to execute trades for users via gasless Permit2 signatures.

params.account: Address that will receive the purchased shares
params.deadline: Unix timestamp after which signature expires
params.maxAmountIn: Max amount of collateral tokens willing to spend (slippage protection)
params.nonce: Permit2 nonce to prevent signature replay
params.outcome: Outcome index for which shares are being bought (e.g., 1=YES, 2=NO)
params.sharesAmount: Number of shares to buy (64.64 fixed point)
params.sig: Permit2 signature from the account authorizing the transfer

returns.amountIn: Actual collateral spent on the purchase

createMarket((string,string,string,strin.details: Deploys a minimal proxy clone of the base market implementation. Only callable by market operators.

params.config: Market parameters including oracle, liquidity, overround, and fee settings
params.data: Market metadata including question, resolution criteria, outcomes, dates, and collateral

returns.newMarketId: Unique identifier for the newly created market

getMarketsConfigs().details: Returns parameters used to validate and configure new markets created by operators.

returns.feeFactor: Protocol fee factor used to calculate fees on market profits (fee = 1 / feeFactor)
returns.implementation: Address of the base market implementation contract used for cloning
returns.minOverround: Minimum overround (in basis points) required for market creation
returns.minSellFeeFactor: Minimum sell fee factor allowed (negative value disables validation)

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

getRoleMember(bytes32,uint256).details: Returns one of the accounts that have `role`. `index` must be a value between 0 and {getRoleMemberCount}, non-inclusive. Role bearers are not sorted in any particular way, and their ordering may change at any point. WARNING: When using {getRoleMember} and {getRoleMemberCount}, make sure you perform all queries on the same block. See the following https://forum.openzeppelin.com/t/iterating-over-elements-on-enumerableset-in-openzeppelin-contracts/2296[forum post] for more information.

getRoleMemberCount(bytes32).details: Returns the number of accounts that have `role`. Can be used together with {getRoleMember} to enumerate all bearers of a role.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role.

marketAccountInfo(uint256,address).details: Returns trading statistics and outcome share balances for an account in the specified market.

params.account: Address of the account to query

returns.balances: Share balances for each outcome, indexed by outcome (balances[0] always unused)
returns.buys: Total number of buy transactions executed by this account
returns.deposited: Total collateral deposited through buy transactions (cumulative)
returns.redeemed: Total collateral redeemed after market closure (0 if not redeemed yet)
returns.sells: Total number of sell transactions executed by this account
returns.withdrawn: Total collateral withdrawn through sell transactions (cumulative)

params.maxAmountIn: Max amount of collateral tokens willing to spend (slippage protection)
params.outcome: The outcome index of which shares are being bought (e.g.: 1 for YES, 2 for NO)
params.sharesAmount: Number of outcome shares to buy (as a signed 64.64-bit fixed point number)

returns.amountIn: Actual amount of collateral tokens spent on the trade

params.outcome: The outcome for which tokens are being bought
params.sharesAmount: Number of outcome shares to buy (as signed 64.64-bit fixed point number)

returns.tokenCost: The token cost amount (as a signed 64.64-bit fixed point number)

marketBuyWithPermit(uint256,uint256,int1.details: The permit signature must approve the Market contract directly (not Master) as the spender.

params.deadline: Unix timestamp after which the permit signature expires
params.maxAmountIn: Max amount of collateral tokens willing to spend (slippage protection)
params.outcome: The outcome index of which shares are being bought (e.g.: 1 for YES, 2 for NO)
params.r: First 32 bytes of the ECDSA signature
params.s: Second 32 bytes of the ECDSA signature
params.sharesAmount: Number of outcome shares to buy (as a signed 64.64-bit fixed point number)
params.v: Recovery byte of the ECDSA signature

returns.amountIn: Actual amount of collateral tokens spent on the trade

marketBuyWithPermit2(uint256,uint256,int.details: This function uses Uniswap's Permit2 contract for signature-based token transfers.

params.deadline: Unix timestamp after which the permit signature expires
params.maxAmountIn: Max amount of collateral tokens willing to spend (slippage protection)
params.nonce: Unique value to prevent signature replay (from Permit2 contract)
params.outcome: The outcome index of which shares are being bought (e.g.: 1 for YES, 2 for NO)
params.sharesAmount: Number of outcome shares to buy (as a signed 64.64-bit fixed point number)

returns.amountIn: Actual amount of collateral tokens spent on the trade

marketCollateralInfo(uint256).details: Returns ERC20 token details (address, name, symbol, decimals) used on the market

returns.decimals: Token decimals (e.g., 6 for USDC, 18 for DAI)
returns.name: Token name (e.g., "USD Coin")

marketPrices(uint256).details: Helper function to fast calculate market prediction and spreads

returns.buyPrices: buy price of 1 share for all outcomes (indexed by outcome)
returns.sellPrices: sell price of 1 share for all outcomes (indexed by outcome)

marketResultInfo(uint256).details: Helper function to show closed market info

returns.closed: Timestamp when the market result was reported
returns.reporter: Address of the market result reporter (market oracle)

params.minAmountOut: Min amount of collateral tokens to obtain (slippage protection)
params.outcome: The outcome of which shares are being sold (e.g.: 1 for YES, 2 for NO)
params.sharesAmount: Number of outcome shares to sell (as a signed 64.64-bit fixed point number)

returns.amountOut: Token amount obtain from selling the specified amount of shares

params.outcome: The outcome for which shares are being sold
params.sharesAmount: The number of outcome shares to sell (as signed 64.64-bit fixed point number)

returns.tokenReturn: The token return amount (as a signed 64.64-bit fixed point number)

marketSetupInfo(uint256).details: Helper function to show market setup info

returns.alpha: The calculated alpha the market [ overround/(n.log(n)) ]
returns.initialCollateral: The total initial collateral received on market setup [ funding ]
returns.initialShares: The total initial shares minted for each outcome [ qi ]
returns.outcomes: Total amount of possible outcomes of the market [ n ]
returns.sellFeeFactor: used to mitigate token leaks and calculate sell fees [ 1/sellFeeFactor ]

marketSharesInfo(uint256).details: Helper function to show general market shares info

returns.cost: Total redeemed shares of the reported outcome
returns.redeemed: Total redeemed shares of the reported outcome
returns.totalShares: Current total shares minted for all outcomes of the market

params.maxAmountIn: Max amount of collateral tokens willing to spend (slippage protection)
params.outcome: The outcome index of which shares are being bought (e.g.: 1 for YES, 2 for NO)
params.sharesAmount: Number of outcome shares to buy (as a signed 64.64-bit fixed point number)

returns.amountIn: Actual amount of collateral tokens spent on the trade

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `account`.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role.

updateMarket(uint256,string,string,strin.details: Pass empty strings or address(0) to skip updating specific fields

withdrawMarketCollateral(uint256).details: Only the registered operator for the specific market can withdraw its collateral.

returns.amount: Total collateral withdrawn (after protocol fee deduction, if applicable)

devdoc.title: PrecogMaster: Manager and factory of Precog markets

addAdmin(address).notice: Grants admin role to an account

addAllowedCollateral(address).notice: Whitelists a collateral token for market creation

addAllowedOracle(address).notice: Whitelists an oracle for market creation

addAllowedReceiver(address).notice: Whitelists an address to receive market collateral withdrawals

addCaller(address).notice: Grants caller role to an account

addOwnedCollateral(address).notice: Registers a collateral token owned by this contract

buyMarketSharesFor(address,uint256,uint2.notice: Buys shares on behalf of another account using Permit2 signature (operator-only)

buyMarketSharesForWithPayer(address,addr.notice: Buys shares for an account with separate payer (account gets shares, payer pays)

createCustomMarket((string,string,string.notice: Creates market with minimal validations for trusted protocol callers

createMarket((string,string,string,strin.notice: Creates a new prediction market with the specified configuration

getMarketsConfigs().notice: Gets the global market creation configuration and protocol parameters

marketAccountInfo(uint256,address).notice: Gets market account information for a specific market

marketBuy(uint256,uint256,int128,uint256.notice: Buys shares for the specified outcome in the desired market

marketBuyPrice(uint256,uint256,int128).notice: Gets the cost of buying the specified amount of outcome shares in the desired market

marketBuyWithPermit(uint256,uint256,int1.notice: Buys shares using EIP-2612 permit signature for gasless approval (advanced, gas-optimized path)

marketBuyWithPermit2(uint256,uint256,int.notice: Buys shares using Permit2 signature for gasless approval (single transaction, any token)

marketCollateralInfo(uint256).notice: Gets collateral token information for a specific market

marketPrices(uint256).notice: Gets market buy and sell prices for all outcomes of the desired market

marketRedeemShares(uint256).notice: Redeems the total sender shares in the desired market

marketResultInfo(uint256).notice: Gets market result summary of the desired market

marketSell(uint256,uint256,int128,uint25.notice: Sells shares for the specified outcome in the desired market

marketSellPrice(uint256,uint256,int128).notice: Gets the return from selling the specified amount of outcome shares in the desired market

marketSharesInfo(uint256).notice: Gets the current market state info of the desired market

marketTransferOwnership(uint256,address).notice: Transfers ownership of a market contract

marketWithdraw(uint256,address).notice: Withdraws accidentally sent non-collateral tokens from a market contract

ownedMarketBuy(uint256,uint256,int128,ui.notice: Buys shares for the specified outcome in a owned collateralized market (advanced, non-approve path)

ownedTokenMove(address,address,address,u.notice: Moves owned collateral tokens between addresses

ownedTokenTransferOwnership(address,addr.notice: Transfers ownership of an owned collateral token

removeAdmin(address).notice: Revokes admin role from an account

removeAllowedCollateral(address).notice: Removes a collateral token from the whitelist

removeAllowedOracle(address).notice: Removes an oracle from the whitelist

removeAllowedReceiver(address).notice: Removes an address from the allowed receivers whitelist

removeCaller(address).notice: Revokes caller role from an account

setBaseMarket(address).notice: Sets the base market implementation for cloning

setMarketMinOverround(uint256).notice: Sets the minimum overround required for market creation

setMarketMinSellFeeFactor(int256).notice: Sets the minimum sell fee factor allowed for markets

setProtocolFeeFactor(uint256).notice: Sets the protocol fee factor (ProtocolFee = 1 / feeFactor)

updateMarket(uint256,string,string,strin.notice: Updates market metadata and configuration (emergency use only)

withdraw(address).notice: Withdraws ETH or tokens from the Master contract

withdrawMarketCollateral(uint256).notice: Withdraws available collateral from a closed market (initial funding + profits)

withdrawMarketCollateralTo(uint256,addre.notice: Withdraws market collateral to whitelisted receiver (trusted protocol callers)
